name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve E3Studio
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug

---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- **Architecture**: [e.g., x64, ARM64]
- **E3Studio Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Build Type**: [e.g., Release, Debug]
- **UI Mode**: [e.g., WPF Desktop, Web UI, Both]

## Logs

Attach relevant log files or paste error messages:

```
Paste logs here
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce the bug
- [ ] I have included my environment details
- [ ] I have attached relevant logs
